mutations.new:
permissions:
  contents: read
env:
  RELEASE_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}

compression-level: 9

  hidden-network:
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    timeout-minutes: 5
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0 # v7.0.0
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false
      - run: curl https://example.invalid/unreviewed

  foundation:

mutations.old:
publication-sequence:
    name: Publication sequence
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
mutations.new:
publication-sequence:
    name: Publication sequence
    if: ${{ false }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04

architecture_evidence_inventory_mutation.subject: .github/workflows/architecture.yml

- name: Run a seventh dedicated architecture check

      - name: Reproduce architecture evidence checks
        run: |

release_contract_mutations.old: Reproduce six dedicated prerequisite/member checks: Gate A prerequisites, PRQ-009 order, schema reissue, module manifest, first-slice scope, and human-decision-assurance successor recomputation. `Foundation` separately runs the complete integrated eleven-check census
release_contract_mutations.new: Reproduce five dedicated prerequisite/member checks: Gate A prerequisites, PRQ-009 order, schema reissue, module manifest, first-slice scope, and human-decision-assurance successor recomputation. `Foundation` separately runs the complete integrated ten-check census

release_contract_mutations.old: The exact inventory contains nineteen retained known-bad mutations
release_contract_mutations.new: The exact inventory contains seventeen retained known-bad mutations
release_contract_mutations.expected: The exact inventory contains nineteen retained known-bad mutations

release_contract_mutations.old:
The public canonical remote already exists at
`https://github.com/manfromnowhere143/odeya`; its default branch is `main`.
release_contract_mutations.new:
The canonical remote remains private and may later be created at
`https://github.com/manfromnowhere143/odeya`; its default branch is `main`.
release_contract_mutations.expected: The public canonical remote already exists

release_contract_mutations.old:
The public canonical remote already exists at
`https://github.com/manfromnowhere143/odeya`; its default branch is `main`.
release_contract_mutations.new:
The public canonical remote already exists at
`https://github.com/example/other`; its default branch is `main`.

release_contract_mutations.old: No architecture commit may be pushed to `main`
release_contract_mutations.new: An architecture commit may be pushed to `main` without exact evidence
release_contract_mutations.expected: No architecture commit may be pushed to `main`

release_contract_mutations.old: A local hook is not server-side branch protection.
release_contract_mutations.new: A local hook is server-side branch protection.
release_contract_mutations.expected: A local hook is not server-side branch protection

release_contract_mutations.old:
It is
history, not a procedure to rerun.
release_contract_mutations.new:
It is
history, not a procedure to rerun. The canonical repository is private and no remote exists.
release_contract_mutations.expected: forbidden contradictory statement 'canonical repository is private'

release_script_mutations.subject: scripts/ci/rehearse-fresh-clone.sh
release_script_mutations.expected: fresh-clone rehearsal must allocate one per-rehearsal tool cache

release_script_mutations.subject: scripts/ci/rehearse-fresh-clone.sh
release_script_mutations.old:
TLA2TOOLS_JAR="$TLA_JAR"
readonly TLA2TOOLS_JAR
export TLA2TOOLS_JAR
bash formal/tla/check.sh
release_script_mutations.expected: fresh-clone rehearsal must bind TLA2TOOLS_JAR to its verified jar

release_script_mutations.subject: scripts/ci/check-repository-release.sh
release_script_mutations.old:
OWN_TOOL_CACHE=0
if [[ -z "${ODEYA_TOOL_CACHE:-}" ]]; then
  ODEYA_TOOL_CACHE="$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/odeya-release-tools.XXXXXX")"
  OWN_TOOL_CACHE=1
fi
readonly ODEYA_TOOL_CACHE
readonly OWN_TOOL_CACHE
export ODEYA_TOOL_CACHE
release_script_mutations.expected: standalone release check must allocate a unique tool cache
